name: Nightflame
location: Bogdan the Nightflame in Elden Hollow II, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you heal yourself or an ally, you have a 20% chance to summon a totem for 6 seconds that heals you and your allies within 5 meters for 704 Health every 1 second. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Max Magicka or Stamina.
